# • Artefact Nodes

2 `artefact` nodes in the spellweb knowledge graph.

## Nodes

- [[The Lexon Constitution (13 spells)]] — The harness's own law written in the language its own loop gates: TRUSTS T1–T6 a
- [[The Manastone]] — The Wellpool's first artefact — a Larimar stone the pool's ceremony charges. Fou
